comment: Deterministic GPU end-to-end constraint suite (generated by make_e2e_spec.py; poses lifted from the upstream demo constraint files). e2e_unreachable is expected to be rejected by the adherence gates.

moves.name: e2e_text
moves.prompt: A person waves with their right hand.

moves.name: e2e_lhand
moves.prompt: A person reaches out with their left hand to touch something.

moves.name: e2e_rhand
moves.prompt: A person reaches out with their right hand to touch something.

moves.name: e2e_lfoot
moves.prompt: A person takes a careful step.

moves.name: e2e_rfoot
moves.prompt: A person takes a careful step.

moves.name: e2e_hands
moves.prompt: A person reaches out with both hands to grab something.

moves.name: e2e_feet
moves.prompt: A person hops and lands on both feet.

moves.name: e2e_hands_feet
moves.prompt: A person crouches and reaches forward with both hands.

moves.name: e2e_hand_rot
moves.prompt: A person picks up an object and places it to the side.

moves.name: e2e_waypoints
moves.prompt: A person walks around the room.

moves.name: e2e_path
moves.prompt: A person walks along a curving path.

moves.name: e2e_mixed
moves.prompt: A person walks forward and reaches for an object.

moves.name: e2e_unreachable
moves.prompt: A person stands still, barely moving.
